channel.title: Vintage Story Mod DB - Latest Updates
channel.description: Newest mod releases and updates from the Vintage Story Mod DB

item.title: Wild Farming Fork
item.description: Cultivate flowers, herbs, mushrooms, trees, and shrubs. And much more.

item.title: Dame Elswyth’s Summons
item.description: Find and summon lost pets. Fixes PetAI fire avoidance AI task for tamed pets.

item.title: Ritual Apotheosis
item.description: Build ancient rites from fragments. The world is your altar. Dig deep. Seek truth. Light the fires.

item.title: Tetromine's Tweaks
item.description: An assortments of tweaks to vanilla content as well as tweaks to existing mods for Vintage Story.

item.title: Boric Alchemy
item.description: Boric Alchemy adds chemical routes to create and refine resources, and create alchemical marvels!

item.title: xLib Fork
item.description: XLib provides an interface to add skills, abilities and effects to the game.

item.title: xSkills Fork
item.description: RPG-style skill system with abilities, perks, and progression.

item.title: Fast Ground Placing
item.description: Increases the bulk stack quantity on a few base game resources.

item.title: Tankards, Goblets and More!
item.description: Drink in style! Adds a variety of tankards and goblets into Vintage Story.

item.title: GGBC's Model Tweaks
item.description: Optimizes Models without notable visual difference. Fixes Z-fighting.

item.title: Dead
item.description: Leaves a lootable corpse of the player (with their exact skin and worn gear) at the death spot

item.title: Deciduous Trees
item.description: Trees slowly shed their leaves based on temperature. Vanilla and Eco Machina compatible.

item.title: Zoom Button Patch
item.description: Hides the player hands and items held while zooming. No more torch in the way!

item.title: Immersive Backpacks
item.description: An overhaul of backpack behavior and rendering in Vintage Story.

item.title: Quarrier -> Excavator traitswise Tweak
item.description: Gave some of the traits from Quarrier @Specialized Classes to Excavator @Insectoid Player Model

item.title: Humanoid's Voices
item.description: New player voices using various instruments and sounds.

item.title: Gatbata's Sawians
item.description: Adds some of the Sawians from Gunsaw and Casualties: Unknown (expies and the like)

item.title: TassHunting
item.description: Arrows Stick - Blood - Smarter Animal AI - Aiming Tweaks - Health Based Animal Speed

item.title: RKN Generic Crafting
item.description: Generic crafting system that completely replaces the UI grid with a more immersive mechanic

item.title: Vintage Story Chinese Language Pack
item.description: Vintage Story Chinese Language Pack（复古物语模组汉化包）

item.title: The Crown & The Coalition Server Tweaks
item.description: Server tweaks for The Crown & The Coalition.

item.title: Vintage Rift - Client
item.description: Client only code for the Vintage Rift server

item.title: Legacy of the Phanerozoic: Tyrant King — Unofficial
item.description: Adds severals tyrannosaurids to Vintage Story. Unofficial compatibility port for 1.22.3

item.title: Legacy of the Phanerozoic: Shovel Mouth — Unofficial
item.description: Adds the family of hadrosauroids dinosaurs to Vintage Story. Unofficial compatibility port for Vinta

item.title: Legacy of the Phanerozoic: Sharp Tooth — Unofficial
item.description: Adds severals carcharodontosaurids to Vintage Story.

item.title: Legacy of the Phanerozoic: Scythe Claws — Unofficial
item.description: Adds the family of therizinosaurids dinosaurs to Vintage Story.

item.title: Legacy of the Phanerozoic: Sailed Spine — Unofficial
item.description: Adds severals spinosaurids to Vintage Story.

item.title: Legacy of the Phanerozoic: Plated Back — Unofficial
item.description: Adds the family of stegosaurian dinosaurs to Vintage Story.

item.title: Legacy of the Phanerozoic: Ocean Tyrant — Unofficial
item.description: Adds severals Mosasaurids to Vintage Story.

item.title: Legacy of the Phanerozoic: Long Neck — Unofficial
item.description: Adds the family of Macronarians dinosaurs to Vintage Story.
